meaning: n.莫雷纳(非洲莱索托人对首领的称呼,也作为对白人等的尊称)(亦作marena)[土著语]
examples: "Sure, but right now I want to meet that morena." I said, pointing out the exotic young girl just as she left the pharmacy and began walking away.
Nathan Fillion (Mal Reynolds) is starring in Castle, Morena Baccarin (Inara) on V, Adam Baldwin (Jayne) on Chuck.
